base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spiny_egg_fall — a projectile from 1985 super mario bros. Lakitu's thrown spiny-before-hatch. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame rotating egg — Lakitu's thrown spiny-before-hatch; rotates while falling then becomes spiny on ground contact
